creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
New release happened since submission, so here's an updated shar.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-CGI-Struct
#	p5-CGI-Struct/Makefile
#	p5-CGI-Struct/distinfo
#	p5-CGI-Struct/pkg-plist
#	p5-CGI-Struct/pkg-descr
#
echo c - p5-CGI-Struct
mkdir -p p5-CGI-Struct > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-CGI-Struct/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-Struct/Makefile << 'fbf90ffb368a676042b3551dadcc62aa'
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	CGI-Struct
XPORTVERSION=	1.21
XCATEGORIES=	www perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	fullermd@over-yonder.net
XCOMMENT=	Build data structures from CGI request parameters
X
XTEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Test-Deep:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Deep
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
XMAN3=		CGI::Struct.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
fbf90ffb368a676042b3551dadcc62aa
echo x - p5-CGI-Struct/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-Struct/distinfo << 'cec24d56f50f7288ff9d19f7dcce8b58'
XSHA256 (CGI-Struct-1.21.tar.gz) = d13d8da7fdcd6d906054e4760fc28a718aec91bd3cf067a58927fb7cb1c09d6c
XSIZE (CGI-Struct-1.21.tar.gz) = 13445
cec24d56f50f7288ff9d19f7dcce8b58
echo x - p5-CGI-Struct/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-Struct/pkg-plist << 'cb859a2efb571e5477ba0060a4c0b994'
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CGI/Struct/.packlist
X%%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/Struct.pm
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/CGI
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CGI/Struct
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/CGI
cb859a2efb571e5477ba0060a4c0b994
echo x - p5-CGI-Struct/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-CGI-Struct/pkg-descr << '050379aa589c882e22fc488c1be9d36a'
XCGI::Struct lets you transform CGI data keys that look like perl data
Xstructures into actual perl data structures.
X
X
XWWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/CGI-Struct/
050379aa589c882e22fc488c1be9d36a
exit
